This [[Minigames|Minigame]] is from the [[Nursery#Red-0|"Join an R&D Team" chore]].

Questions do not have to be answered correctly ''in the same game'' to count for reward credit.

Questions can be asked in any order.

{| class="wikitable"
!Question
!Answer

|-
|In the Chinese classic novel Journey to the West, which animal is Sun Wukong?
|Monkey

|-
|Which of the following martial arts is Chinese?
|Kung Fu

|-
|What are Bao?
|Steamed dumplings

|-
|In traditional Chinese medical treatments, what is the main treatment method that uses needles?
|Acupuncture

|-
|How many time zones are there in China?
|1

|-
|Which of the following numbers is typically considered to be unlucky in Chinese culture?
|4

|-
|What lord died in Guandu?
|Yuan Shao

|-
|Which city is the capital of China?
|Beijing

|-
|Under which kind of tree did the three sworn brothers Liu Bei, Guan Yu, and Zhang Fei make an unbreakable oath of fraternity?
|Peach

|-
|What is the nickname for Macau, a Special Administrative Region of China?
|Las Vegas of the East

|-
|Who is known as The Beauty?
|Diao Chan

|-
|What were the names of the Three Kingdoms?
|Wei, Shu, Wu

|-
|What is Chinese Valentine's Day called?
|Qixi Festival

|-
|In what year were the Three Kingdoms founded?
|220AD

|-
|What is the official currency of China?
|RMB

|-
|Which of the following countries does NOT share the border with China?
|South Korea

|-
|Which kingdom founded the Five Tiger Generals?
|Shu

|-
|Which mythical animal is the symbol of the emperor's power in China?
|Dragon

|-
|What has been the official language of China since the 1930s?
|Mandarin

|-
|What is the main source of food in China?
|Rice

|-
|Which of the following is a popular Chinese dish?
|Dim sum

|-
|What school of thought is Tai Chi associated with?
|Taoism

|-
|What is China's major import?
|Crude oil

|-
|What is the world's first Asia to Europe trade route?
|The Silk Road

|-
|Which of the following facts is true about Chinese writing?
|It has no alphabet

|-
|One of the world's wonders in China is?
|The Great Wall

|-
|Sicuan cuisine is known for its ___?
|Spiciness

|-
|What is the most famous animal in China?
|Giant panda

|-
|What is the most popular religion in China?
|Buddhism

|-
|Which Shu general is known for his loud roar?
|General Zhang Fei

|-
|Yao Ming is a former Chinese professional player in which sport?
|Basketball

|-
|Which concept in Chinese philosophy declares that the universe consists of two contrary, yet complementary forces?
|Yin and Yang

|-
|What is the largest palace building in China?
|Forbidden City

|-
|What do children typically receive at Chinese New Year?
|Money in red envelopes

|-
|What is the first dynasty that united China?
|Qin dynasty

|}

[[Category:Guides]]
[[Category:Minigames]]
